info.title: dotnet-grpc
info.description: Command line tool for gRPC projects

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: add-file
commands.description: Add protobuf file reference(s) to the gRPC project.

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: The protobuf file reference(s). These can be a path to glob for local protobuf file(s).

commands.name: add-url
commands.description: Add a protobuf url reference to the gRPC project.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The URL to a remote protobuf file.

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Check remote protobuf references(s) for updates and replace them if a newer version is available. If no file or url is provided, all remote protobuf files will be updated.

arguments.name: references
arguments.description: The URL(s) or file path(s) to remote protobuf references(s) that should be updated. Leave this argument empty to refresh all remote references.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove protobuf references(s) from the gRPC project.

arguments.name: references
arguments.description: The URL(s) or file path(s) of the protobuf references to remove.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List the protobuf references of the gRPC project.
